tool.name: IMAGINE-X subhkl Prepare Peaks
tool.command:
mkdir out ;
#set $FILE_LIST = ""
#for $input_file in $input mv $input_file $input_file.element_identifier ; #end for
#set $options = ""
#if $wavelengthMin: #set $options = $options + " " + str($wavelengthMin) #end if #if $wavelengthMax: #set $options = $options + " " + str($wavelengthMax) #end if
#for $Z in $input: #set $BN = str($Z.element_identifier) #set $filename = "out/" + str($BN) + ".reduce.h5" python -m subhkl.io.parser reduce $Z.element_identifier $filename $instrument $options ; #set $FILE_LIST = $FILE_LIST + $filename + " " #end for
python -m subhkl.io.parser merge-images $FILE_LIST out/scan_master.h5 $a $b $c $alpha $beta $gamma $spaceGroup ;
